Interaction.LockedPrompt: The door needs a basement key.
Interaction.SuccessMessage: The Basement Key turns in the lock.

Interaction.LockedPrompt: A wire is missing from this part of the circuit.
Interaction.SuccessMessage: Wire A snaps into the circuit.

Interaction.LockedPrompt: A second wire is missing from this part of the circuit.
Interaction.SuccessMessage: Wire B bridges the broken contact.

Interaction.LockedPrompt: The last cable run is still open.
Interaction.SuccessMessage: Wire C completes the cable run.

Interaction.LockedPrompt: The lever has no power. Complete the circuit first.
Interaction.SuccessMessage: Power surges through the motor. The rolling door is opening.
